### 🆕 FinHealthUpcomingInsightsExtension

> `/System/Library/ExtensionKit/Extensions/FinHealthUpcomingInsightsExtension.appex/FinHealthUpcomingInsightsExtension`

```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
	<key>application-identifier</key>
	<string>com.apple.finhealth.FinHealthUpcomingInsightsExtension</string>
	<key>com.apple.finance.internal.read</key>
	<true/>
	<key>com.apple.private.finhealthd</key>
	<true/>
	<key>com.apple.security.exception.mach-lookup.global-name</key>
	<array>
		<string>com.apple.finhealthd.service</string>
	</array>
</dict>
</plist>

```
### FindMyIntentsExtension

> `/System/Library/ExtensionKit/Extensions/FindMyIntentsExtension.appex/FindMyIntentsExtension`

```diff

 	<true/>
 	<key>com.apple.icloud.searchpartyd.ownersession</key>
 	<true/>
+	<key>com.apple.private.accounts.allaccounts</key>
+	<true/>
 	<key>com.apple.private.appintents-attribution-override</key>
 	<true/>
 	<key>com.apple.private.appintents.attribution.bundle-identifier</key>
```

### 🆕 cksharingmanagementd

> `/System/Library/PrivateFrameworks/CKSharingManagementDaemon.framework/Support/cksharingmanagementd`

```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
	<key>application-identifier</key>
	<string>com.apple.cksharingmanagementd</string>
	<key>com.apple.developer.icloud-container-environment</key>
	<string>Production</string>
	<key>com.apple.developer.icloud-container-identifiers</key>
	<array>
		<string>*</string>
	</array>
	<key>com.apple.developer.icloud-services</key>
	<array>
```
